author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:

author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
Inside the Repainting of Cinderella Castle | Disney Unscripted
Step inside the incredible transformation of one of the most iconic landmarks in the world. In this episode of Disney Unscripted, go behind the scenes with talented teams and cast members responsible for transforming Cinderella Castle to its beloved original color palette of blue, gray, and shimmering gold, first announced at Destination D23 in 2025. From draining the moat surrounding the castle to executing meticulous repainting high above Magic Kingdom Park, this project required precision, teamwork, and a whole lot of Disney magic. Get ready for jaw-dropping POVs, rare access, and the craftsmanship that keeps the magic alive.

🎥 Watch more Disney Unscripted episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLflf8xbnbx671EAWfbq06i6S5EMqf7_i5
